reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.25 , reason:  [Incorrect range check: conditions like 's[i-1]>='a' && s[i+1]<='z'' do not ensure both characters are of the same type or even within valid ranges; should check both ends belong to same category]
